# Gram AI

> AI-powered farming assistant for Indian farmers — crop disease diagnosis, live mandi prices, weather forecasts, government schemes, and multilingual voice support.

Gram AI helps farmers across India make better decisions with on-device AI guidance in English, Hindi, Marathi, Telugu, Tamil, and Bengali.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Gram AI features and entry points.
- [AI Assistant](/chat): Conversational farming assistant with voice in regional languages.
- [Crop Center](/crop-center): Scan crops for disease, get guidance, and identify pests.
- [Crop Guidance](/crop-guidance): Step-by-step cultivation guides for major Indian crops.
- [Pest & Disease](/pest-disease): Diagnose pests and diseases with treatment recommendations.
- [Scan Crop](/scan): Upload a crop image for instant AI disease detection.
- [Market Prices](/market-prices): Live mandi prices for crops across Indian states.
- [Weather](/weather): Farm-focused weather forecasts and crop advisory.
- [Farming Calendar](/calendar): Sowing, irrigation, and harvest timelines by crop.
- [Community](/community): Discussion forum for Indian farmers.
- [Government Schemes](/schemes): Eligibility and details for Indian agricultural schemes.
- [Smart Recommendations](/recommendations): Personalized crop and input suggestions.
- [Animal Husbandry](/animal-husbandry): Livestock care guides and best practices.

## Optional

- [Sign In](/login): User authentication.
- [Profile](/profile): User account and preferences.
